title: Many Many Tools
description: This mod has three new tool types. Ther are two newly added tools to the game. These new tools are exclusive to the three new materials.
body:
This mod includes 3 new matirials. The first , and weekest matirial is cardboard. Cardboard is a week and flimsy. The second matirial is ruby. Ruby is alot stronger than card board and lasts a long time. The last matirial is vibranium. Vibranium is the strongest of the three tools. It has over 300 durability for each of the tools. This mod also includes 2 new tools to the game, but they are exusive to the new tool types. So yo can not craft the with the basic matirials (Wood, Stone, Gold, Diamond, Netherite). I will leave it to you to find out what the 2 new tool types are, when you figur it out, coment what they are and what you think of the mod. Hope you guys have fun with it. 

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/PhqUEmVDVp) for mod updates!
